title: Cutting a Rod
hints: This is essentially an unbounded knapsack problem where the rod length is the capacity.
Use dynamic programming: dp[L] represents the maximum value for a rod of length L.
For each length L, try all possible first cuts from length 1 to L.
For a cut of length cut_len, the value is A[cut_len-1] + dp[L - cut_len].
Take the maximum over all possible first cuts: dp[L] = max(A[i-1] + dp[L-i]) for i from 1 to L.
Base case: dp[0] = 0 (no value for zero length rod).
